module.title: Unix system module
module.description: Various system related checks, such as CPU load, process state and memory.
module.name: CheckSystem

commands.check_cpu: Check that the load of the CPU(s) are within bounds.
commands.check_cpu_utilization: Check CPU utilization broken down by user/system/iowait/steal/guest.
commands.check_uptime: Check time since last server re-boot.
commands.check_memory: Check free/used memory on the system.
commands.check_os_version: Check the version of the underlying OS.
commands.check_os_updates: Check for available OS package updates via the system package manager (apt/dnf/yum/zypper/pacman).
commands.check_pagefile: Check the size of the system pagefile(s).
commands.check_service: Check the state of one or more of the computer services.
commands.check_process: Check state/metrics of one or more of the processes running on the computer.
commands.check_cpu_frequency: Check the CPU clock frequency (current vs max) per core.
commands.check_battery: Check battery charge level, power source and health.
commands.check_network: Check network interface status and throughput.
commands.check_process_history: Check the history of processes seen since NSClient++ started (requires 'process history = true').
commands.check_process_history_new: Check for processes first seen within a recent time window (requires 'process history = true').
